targetTranslation: when (referring to a future event that will definitely happen)
ayahEnglish: When the sky breaks apart

targetTranslation: it (feminine) split/broke apart by itself (referring to السَّمَآءُ/the sky)
ayahEnglish: When the sky breaks apart

targetTranslation: it (feminine) scattered itself (said about الْكَوَاكِبُ - the stars)
ayahEnglish: And when the stars fall, scattering,

targetTranslation: it (feminine) was made to burst forth (referring to البِحَارُ - the seas)
ayahEnglish: And when the seas are erupted

targetTranslation: were completely scattered (referring to الْقُبُورُ/the graves)
ayahEnglish: And when the [contents of] graves are scattered [i.e., exposed],
A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,

targetTranslation: he thoroughly deceived/deluded you (referring to الْإِنسٰنُ - mankind)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,

targetTranslation: The One who (refers to Allah who خَلَقَكَ created you)
ayahEnglish: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?

targetTranslation: he created you (object of الَّذِى who)
ayahEnglish: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?

ayahArabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayahEnglish: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.

targetTranslation: any form/shape (that Allah willed to assemble you in)
ayahArabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayahEnglish: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.

ayahArabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayahEnglish: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.

targetTranslation: He formed you (referring to how Allah carefully assembled/fashioned humans)
ayahArabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayahEnglish: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
No! But you deny the Recompense.

targetTranslation: noble ones (as the object of كٰتِبِينَ)
ayahEnglish: Noble and recording;
Noble and recording;
They know whatever you do.
They know whatever you do.
They know whatever you do.
Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,

targetTranslation: an intensely burning fire (in لَفِى/truly in)
ayahEnglish: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
And never therefrom will they be absent.

targetTranslation: made you know (connected to وَمَآ meaning 'and what')
ayahEnglish: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

targetTranslation: what (asking about يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ - the Day of Judgment)
ayahEnglish: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahEnglish: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

targetTranslation: day (in accusative case - used as object or time)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
ayahEnglish: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allāh.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
ayahEnglish: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allāh.

ayahEnglish: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allāh.

ayahEnglish: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allāh.
